matches.lb: Quoting Commentary: Ibn Ezra on Exodus 31:2:2
matches.x: [I HAVE CALLED BY NAME BEZALEL.] Bezalel is the one being called.8The word karati (I have called) is to be connected to bezalel ben uri (Bezalel the son of Uri) rather than to the word be-shem (by name). Thus karati be-shem bezalel ben uri (I have called by name Bezalel the son of Uri) is to be rendered: I have called Bezalel the son of Uri by name. I.E. comments thus because karati be-shem…
